plugins.name: Top.gg Voter Role
plugins.short_description: Auto-reward Top.gg voters with Discord roles that expire on a configurable timer (1 hour to 7 days).
plugins.description: A RoleLogic plugin that automatically assigns a Discord role to users who upvote your bot on Top.gg. Roles are granted within seconds via signed Top.gg webhook events (HMAC-SHA256) and automatically removed when the configurable TTL expires — anywhere from 1 hour to 168 hours. Multi-server distribution, no manual cleanup, no scheduled jobs. Integrates with RoleLogic's role link system to reward and recognize community members who support your Discord bot on Top.gg.
plugins.author: RoleLogic

plugins.name: Genshin Player Role
plugins.short_description: Verify Genshin Impact players by UID and assign Discord roles based on AR, World Level, Spiral Abyss, achievements, characters, and server region.
plugins.description: A RoleLogic plugin that automatically assigns Discord roles based on Genshin Impact player stats. Players verify by UID with a one-time profile-signature handshake; data is pulled from Enka.Network's public API (no HoYoLAB login required). Configure conditions using Adventure Rank (1–60), World Level (0–8), achievements, Spiral Abyss floor + chamber clears or total stars (0–36), server region (NA / EU / Asia / TW-HK-MO / CN), showcased character with optional level and constellation filters, or showcased namecard. Roles stay synced as players progress. View a list of verified Genshin Impact players in your Discord server to track linked accounts and their stats.
plugins.author: RoleLogic

plugins.name: YouTube Subscriber Role
plugins.short_description: Auto-assign Discord roles to verified YouTube subscribers with one-click Google OAuth.
plugins.description: A RoleLogic plugin that automatically assigns Discord roles to members subscribed to a YouTube channel. Members verify through Google OAuth, and the plugin periodically checks subscription status via the YouTube Data API on an adaptive schedule (active members re-checked roughly 6× more often than idle ones). Roles are dynamically assigned to active subscribers and removed when they unsubscribe, keeping your Discord server roles synced with your YouTube audience. Members must keep their subscription list public for the API to verify.
plugins.author: RoleLogic

plugins.name: GitHub Contributor Role
plugins.short_description: Auto-assign Discord roles based on real GitHub contributions — commits, PRs, merged PRs, or issues on any public repo.
plugins.description: A RoleLogic plugin that automatically assigns Discord roles based on GitHub contribution activity. Configure conditions on commits, pull requests, merged PRs, or issues on any public repository, with operators including =, >, >=, <, <=, and between for range thresholds. Members link Discord and GitHub via OAuth, and the plugin continuously tracks their contributions on the verified email tied to their GitHub account. Perfect for open source community recognition, hackathon and bounty events, issue-reporter rewards, and per-repo gating across multi-project organizations.
plugins.author: RoleLogic

plugins.name: Twitch Follower Role
plugins.short_description: Real-time Discord roles for Twitch followers and Tier 1 / Tier 2 / Tier 3 subscribers via EventSub.
plugins.description: A RoleLogic plugin that assigns Discord roles based on Twitch channel follow and subscription status. Users link Discord and Twitch via OAuth, then roles are automatically assigned based on configurable conditions: require follower status with optional minimum follow days, and/or require subscriber status with optional minimum tier (1 = any, including Twitch Prime; 2 = Tier 2 or higher; 3 = Tier 3 only). Uses Twitch EventSub for near-instant follow, unfollow, sub, and unsub event delivery — no polling, no delay. Keeps Discord roles synced with real Twitch activity in seconds.
plugins.author: RoleLogic

plugins.name: Member Origin Role
plugins.short_description: Auto-assign Discord roles by country, timezone, UTC offset, language, platform, browser, or device type — with built-in VPN and impossible-travel detection.
plugins.description: A RoleLogic plugin that assigns Discord roles based on member origin detected from HTTP headers and browser APIs. Automatically detects country (via Cloudflare CF-IPCountry), IANA timezone, UTC offset, browser language (Accept-Language), platform (Windows / macOS / Linux / Android / iOS / ChromeOS), browser (Chrome / Firefox / Safari / Edge / Opera), and device type (Desktop / Mobile / Tablet). Numeric fields support range conditions. Built-in anti-fraud toggles block VPN/Tor users, spoofed identities, and impossible-travel scenarios — AND'd with the identity condition so VPN users are rejected even when their country matches. No GPS, no third-party fingerprinting; raw IPs are not retained beyond the verification check.
plugins.author: RoleLogic

plugins.name: Steam Player Role
plugins.short_description: Verify Steam profiles via OpenID and assign Discord roles by games owned, playtime, achievements, Steam level, VAC status, group membership, and country.
plugins.description: A RoleLogic plugin that automatically assigns Discord roles based on Steam profile data. Members verify through Steam OpenID — the same secure flow used by SteamDB and other Steam-powered sites — and roles are assigned based on configurable conditions including game ownership, total playtime, recent (last-2-weeks) playtime, achievement count, achievement completion percentage, specific achievements, Steam level, account age, total games owned, VAC ban status, game ban status, Steam group membership, and country. Operators include =, >, >=, <, <=, and between (range). Background data refresh keeps roles continuously synced with real Steam activity. Members must keep their Steam profile and game-details privacy public for the API to read playtime and achievements.
plugins.author: RoleLogic

plugins.name: Referral Code Role
plugins.short_description: Auto-assign Discord roles when members redeem codes — supports QR codes, time-limited batches, and 100k+ members per role link.
plugins.description: A RoleLogic plugin that automatically grants Discord roles when members redeem codes. Create code batches with three modes: unique-per-code (each code redeemable once), unique-per-user (each code usable multiple times but once per user), or shared-unlimited (one code for unlimited users). Configure per-code and per-user redemption caps, batch expiry, automatic role duration (auto-revoke after N hours), and optional Discord invite links. Generate codes manually or in bulk; every code gets a shareable URL and downloadable QR code. Members sign in via Discord OAuth, redeem the code, and receive the role instantly with full redemption history tracking. Admin dashboard shows real-time stats and redemption logs. Built for scale: supports 100,000+ members per role link with atomic syncs. Perfect for Kickstarter rewards, podcast shout-outs, event wristbands, conference flyers, giveaways, and exclusive access programs.
plugins.author: RoleLogic

plugins.name: Roblox Player Role
plugins.short_description: Verify Roblox players and auto-assign Discord roles by account age, verified badge, gamepasses, group rank, and custom per-game stats.
plugins.description: A RoleLogic plugin that automatically assigns Discord roles based on Roblox account data, group membership, and custom in-game stats. Members link their Roblox account once via OAuth; roles are assigned using configurable conditions across three categories: Account (age, verified badge, friend/follower/following counts, ownership of specific badges/gamepasses/assets), Group (membership in a Roblox group, or minimum role rank within it), and Game (any custom stats reported by your Roblox game as custom numeric, boolean, or string fields — you define the stat names and conditions). Game stats are flexible and delivered via direct server push (batched in 60s intervals via the shipped Studio plugin or HttpService webhook) or polled automatically from Roblox Open Cloud DataStore v2 (no code changes required). Examples: level, wins, playtime, currency, isVIP, guild_score. Roles stay continuously synced as players progress. View verified Roblox players in your Discord server, tracking linked accounts and their stats. Scales to 30M+ members per role link.
plugins.author: RoleLogic
